scope: Run the starter hybrid MiroFish spec and save an end-to-end evaluation artifact

problem.summary: The repo could canonicalize discovery packets and build hybrid specs, but it still lacked a saved end-to-end example showing how a discovered candidate performs against a stable benchmark panel under the current harness.
problem.decision: Add a repo-local hybrid runner, execute the starter spec, and save both the JSON result and a compact interpretation note.

deliverables.purpose: Runs a saved hybrid spec through dual-context simulation and builder ensemble aggregation.
Exposes `mirofish-hybrid-run` as a repo-local CLI command.
Stores the starter end-to-end hybrid evaluation output.
Summarizes the starter run outcome in a human-readable research note.

verification_plan: Run chip-labs mirofish-hybrid-run on the saved starter hybrid spec
Confirm the discovered candidate is ranked against the benchmark panel in the output
